debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝² : CompleteLattice α
inst✝¹ : DistribLattice α
inst✝ : BoundedOrder α
S : Set α
R : @refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S
⊢ sSup (@decomposition_of_refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S R) = sSup S

failed_attempts:
apply le_antisymm
  · apply sSup_le
    intro x hx
    simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    obtain ⟨D, hD, hxD⟩ := hx
    obtain ⟨a, haS, haD⟩ := R.carrier_covers D hD
    calc x ≤ sSup D := le_sSup hxD
    _ = a := haD.symm
    _ ≤ sSup S := le_sSup haS
  · apply sSup_le
    intro a ha
    obtain ⟨D, ⟨hD, rfl⟩, _⟩ := R.carrier_span a ha
    apply sSup_le_sSup
    intro x hx
    simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]
    exact ⟨D, hD, hx⟩
